frame_analyses.description: Instructor loads the needle onto the needle driver.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper needle grasp with the tip exposed.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is being placed through the first mark on the drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Accurate approach to the marked area.

frame_analyses.description: Needle passes through the second mark.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintains good alignment, slight deviation noted.

frame_analyses.description: Beginning the first throw of the surgeon's knot.
Completing the surgeon's knot with double throw.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appears to use a surgeon’s knot correctly.

frame_analyses.description: Starting the second throw and switching hands.
Initiating the third throw, switching hands again.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switch and good technique noted.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting the suture ends inside the trainer.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Efficient cutting within the designated area.

knot_assessments.notes: Proper double throw for surgeon’s knot observed.
Second throw with correct hand switch.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit closed completely without gaps.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated proficiency in suture placement and knot tying techniques. Suture deviation was minimal, and knot throws were secure with proper hand switching documented.
improvement_suggestions: Minimize suture deviation during needle placement.
Maintain consistent tension throughout the procedure.
strengths: Efficient knot tying with secure throws.
Effective hand switches between knot throws.
